name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: we just aren’t meeting those goals
body:
This election is anything but normal | Peter --

I’ve been blown away by the response to our emails this week. This team has stepped up, and because of you, we’re tracking closer to our fundraising goals again.

But we’re not quite there. And frankly, Peter, I'm not going to be comfortable until we aren’t just meeting those goals -- we’re beating them. **[Can you chip in (and yes, get a free sticker!) right now?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I hate losing. I always have.

But I've never worked on a campaign before where the prospect of defeat left me feeling quite like this.

You lose a typical race, and it's disappointing. But it's something you have to accept in a democracy. Sometimes, the other side gets a chance to govern.

A Trump presidency wouldn't be like that.

If we take him at his word and just believe that he's going to do the things he says, we run the risk of a devastating recession, frayed relationships with allies around the world, deep divisions across our country -- and a whole series of enemies emboldened to challenge our standing in the world.

If there’s even a twenty -- honestly, if there’s even a ten percent chance of that happening -- well then, I’ve got more work to do. We have to raise so much money and register so many voters that this guy doesn’t even have a shot.

**So yeah, we need you right now. Will you chip in to make sure we don’t risk everything come November?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYzMDg5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzOTU0NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0)

body:

Peter,

I've been reading your advice and listening to your concerns.

**Between now and Election Day, we have one shared goal: stop Hillary Clinton.**

Which is why I want your hand in crafting an actionable plan to defeat her.

[**Please take the Stop Hillary Survey now. >>**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37151940:W2fpVkb5N:m:1:1155937413:DA2EE5069046F67FD0CF3C95F87873AA:r)

We need to challenge Hillary on the core issues and expose her corruption to the American people. On all accounts, Hillary is absolutely unqualified to lead our great nation.

But first I need your help.

I've said it before: my trusted advisors are the American people. I don't care what the special interests, the media, or lobbyists say is the right path.

_I want to know what YOU think is the right path to victory this November._

And I even had my team add an open comment box at the end of the survey where you can provide additional input on what you want to see happen between now and Election Day.

name: Kellyanne Conway, Team Trump
subject: I am Donald Trump's new campaign manager
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
The election is coming up FAST. Get your input in now. | |
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37151532:W3fevkb9N:m:1:876315805:DB1FFAC8313AE572206DF036517C7789:r)

Peter,

I am proud to join the team as Mr. Trump's new campaign manager.

Yesterday I asked him to give me a list of our strongest supporters.

Your name showed up on the list as a Big League supporter.

Which is why I'm asking for your valuable input on the state of the race and the issues you care about.

[**Please complete the Platform for America Survey today.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37151532:W3fevkb9N:m:1:876315805:DB1FFAC8313AE572206DF036517C7789:r)

You've probably received a few surveys from us over the past month already. These surveys play a crucial role in helping us shape our message and ensuring we're on track to WIN.

But we still have a lot to do, and little time to do it.

We have 77 days to:
* Broaden our support and win over the hearts of undecided voters
* Fight back against Hillary's slanderous attacks with ads of our own
* Execute a massive, nationwide grassroots ground game

**Your honest, critical feedback helps us keep our campaign on message -- and ensures it 's resonating with the American people.**

[**Take the Survey Now >>**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37151532:W3fevkb9N:m:1:876315805:DB1FFAC8313AE572206DF036517C7789:r)

I don't have to tell you -- the mainstream media is always going to try to distort our message.

But my job is to help cut through the media's noise and get our message straight to the voter.

To successfully do that, I need your help. I need to know where you stand on a variety of issues facing our country.

Between now and November 8, every single day counts.

[**Please make it your priority to complete the Platform for America Survey.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37151532:W3fevkb9N:m:1:876315805:DB1FFAC8313AE572206DF036517C7789:r)

Thank you, Peter. I look forward to reading your responses,

Kellyanne Conway
Campaign Manager
Donald Trump for President

**[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37151532:W3fevkb9N:m:1:876315805:DB1FFAC8313AE572206DF036517C7789:r)**

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

body:
Peter, all eyes are on Arizona because John McCain is facing a tough re-election campaign against a liberal Democrat--Congresswoman Ann Kirkpatrick. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37164026:skJVMkbvN:m:1:1353064270:3175E72E6CB6B6F9CFF854E55289AE25:r)
---
Peter,

I'm emailing you today because our Republican Senate Majority is in jeopardy and victory may come down to just one race... **ARIZONA.**

Peter, all eyes are on Arizona because John McCain is facing a tough re-election campaign against a liberal Democrat--Congresswoman Ann Kirkpatrick.

You may know Ann Kirkpatrick as a faithful servant of the Democrat establishment and Nancy Pelosi. She has been a rubber-stamp vote for their disastrous policies and even called her vote on Obamacare her _"proudest"_. **If she wins this race, she is guaranteed to be a rubber-stamp vote for Hillary in the Senate.**

Peter, the Democrats know they can count on Ann to support anything they want, and they are pouring millions into Arizona to make sure she defeats John McCain.

[**We CANNOT allow that to happen. Will you stand with me in supporting John McCain right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37164026:skJVMkbvN:m:1:1353064270:3175E72E6CB6B6F9CFF854E55289AE25:r)

[**> >> DONATE <<<**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37164026:skJVMkbvN:m:1:1353064270:3175E72E6CB6B6F9CFF854E55289AE25:r)
As we've seen in this election, no one can take anything for granted and I know that John McCain is not taking this election for granted. He is working hard canvassing the state, talking with every voter possible and running a strong campaign.

But he needs our help to push him over the line to victory.

**[Will you stand with me in making a contribution to John's Senate campaign right now?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37164026:skJVMkbvN:m:1:1353064270:3175E72E6CB6B6F9CFF854E55289AE25:r)**

I have worked with John and watched him chair the Senate Armed Services Committee.

**I know how hard John works for veterans, for the military, for our national security-and I know that John McCain is a national treasure.**

We cannot afford to lose John McCain's voice in the Senate. We need to fight back against the Democrats' millions in Arizona and stand strong with John.

I'm doing everything I can to make sure that Senator John McCain wins his re-election campaign and **[I hope you will join me today in doing just that.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37164026:skJVMkbvN:m:1:1353064270:3175E72E6CB6B6F9CFF854E55289AE25:r)**

Sincerely,

name: Brian Zuzenak, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Ready to get people pumped up on Saturday in Woodbridge?
body:
| Peter --

After an election filled with unexpected twists and turns, we’re finally closing in on one of my favorite parts of any campaign: Get Out the Vote.

Get Out the Vote, or GOTV, is when we finally get to flex our organizing muscle. We’ve been training organizers, opening field offices, and growing our volunteer teams for more than a year, and now we get to see if we’re ready to turn out voters and win this election once and for all. Peter, we need your help to do that.

On Saturday, folks are getting together in Woodbridge to help register voters, recruit more volunteers, and get the word out about what’s really at stake on Election Day -- **[can you join us Saturday for a few hours?](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/events/view/T5UJPQ4VZVSNZIYK/?givenName=Peter&familyName=Willis&phoneNumber=&zipCode=20112&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&?utm_source=sp&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160823ntl_event&utm_content=26308991-20160823-HFA-woa-t1 \(2\))**

Here are the details:
**WHAT:** Saturday Phone Bank for HIllary!
**WHEN:** Saturday, August 27th
12:00 pm - 05:00 pm
**WHERE:** 4349 Ridgewood Center Dr
Woodbridge, VA 22192

We know we have the best team out there. Trump can release as many TV ads and hold as many stadium rallies as he wants, but we’re going to be on the ground in communities talking to voters about real issues, the stakes of this election, and why Hillary is the only choice for president.

As we head into the final stretch of this campaign, every day and every door knocked makes a difference -- you can be part of that in Woodbridge.

**RSVP to join us for a few hours on Saturday:** [](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/events/view/T5UJPQ4VZVSNZIYK/?givenName=Peter&familyName=Willis&phoneNumber=&zipCode=20112&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&?utm_source=sp&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160823ntl_event&utm_content=26308991-20160823-HFA-woa-t1 \(2\))
Thanks,

Brian

clean_body: | Peter -- After an election filled with unexpected twists and turns, we’re finally closing in on one of my favorite parts of any campaign: Get Out the Vote. Get Out the Vote, or GOTV, is when we finally get to flex our organizing muscle. We’ve been training organizers, opening field offices, and growing our volunteer teams for more than a year, and now we get to see if we’re ready to turn out voters and win this election once and for all. Peter, we need your help to do that. On Saturday, folks are getting together in Woodbridge to help register voters, recruit more volunteers, and get the word out about what’s really at stake on Election Day -- \(2\) Here are the details: WHAT: Saturday Phone Bank for HIllary! WHEN: Saturday, August 27th 12:00 pm - 05:00 pm WHERE: 4349 Ridgewood Center Dr Woodbridge, VA 22192 We know we have the best team out there. Trump can release as many TV ads and hold as many stadium rallies as he wants, but we’re going to be on the ground in communities talking to voters about real issues, the stakes of this election, and why Hillary is the only choice for president. As we head into the final stretch of this campaign, every day and every door knocked makes a difference -- you can be part of that in Woodbridge. disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Join me, and show your support with a free Women for Russ bumper sticker today. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4447/1c469400/736b293/3573abc/3859685903/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/women-for-russ?utm_source=ema_2016-08-23_women-for-russ_KS&source=ema_2016-08-23_women-for-russ_KS&utm_campaign=women-for-russ&utm_medium=ema") Friend, | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4447/1c469400/736b293/3573abc/3859685903/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/women-for-russ?utm_source=ema_2016-08-23_women-for-russ_KS&source=ema_2016-08-23_women-for-russ_KS&utm_campaign=women-for-russ&utm_medium=ema")
---
If you'd told 20-year-old me that someday I'd be a state legislator, and I'd get to introduce my political hero, Russ Feingold, to small business owners in my district, I might've laughed in your face.
_But it happened!_
Russ embodies what it means to be a public servant: He's an independent voice who puts people above politics. He's been traveling across Wisconsin since day one of this campaign to listen to folks from all walks of life. He'll always take time to listen -- because Russ cares.
**[I'm proud to be a founding member of Women for Russ, a strong coalition of women across Wisconsin and America who are excited to send Russ to the Senate. Will you join us? Add your name right now to get your free Women for Russ bumper sticker.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4447/1c469400/736b293/3573abc/3859685903/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/women-for-russ?utm_source=ema_2016-08-23_women-for-russ_KS&source=ema_2016-08-23_women-for-russ_KS&utm_campaign=women-for-russ&utm_medium=ema")**
In 2012, a seat opened up in my home district in Portage County. Like many women, I didn't think I was qualified: As the saying goes, women have to be asked eight times before they even allow themselves to think about running for public office. **I ran --_and I won._** At age 25, I became the youngest person in the Wisconsin State Assembly. Now, I'm the youngest member of Assembly leadership and the highest-ranking woman in the Wisconsin State Assembly.
My road to public office wasn't easy. I've dealt with my fair share of sexism along the way -- the double standards that every single woman has had to face in her life.
But I've never seen being a woman as a liability: It's an asset. And women deserve to be represented by lawmakers who know that women's voices are a strength -- we bring important, valuable ideas to the table, whether that table's in a kitchen, a boardroom, or a classroom.
**[Russ has always been a champion for women and for the issues that matter to us. Join Women for Russ, and get your free Women for Russ bumper sticker today. (If you're not a woman, forward this email to the women you know who support Russ!)](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4447/1c469400/736b293/3573abc/3859685903/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/women-for-russ?utm_source=ema_2016-08-23_women-for-russ_KS&source=ema_2016-08-23_women-for-russ_KS&utm_campaign=women-for-russ&utm_medium=ema")**
I'm working hard every single day to help elect Russ, and I know you are, too. Join me, and show your support with a free Women for Russ bumper sticker today.
Thanks,
Katrina Shankland
Assistant Democratic Leader
Wisconsin State Assembly

body:
Ryan Zinke for Congress

Peter, I wanted you to see Evan's email so you know how serious
this is.

Hey Peter,

I don't normally forward internal emails from my campaign
manager, but I wanted you to see Evan's email so you know how
serious this is.

My fundraising is not what it needs to be to win my election in
less than 80 days.

And I can't ask you to single-handedly cover my fundraising
shortfall. But it would be a huge personal favor to me if you
could chip in $25 or $5.

http://www.ryanzinke.com/favor

Thank you,
- Ryan

Sent from my Android phone

Begin forwarded message:

From: Evan Wilson
Date: August 23rd, 2016
To: Ryan Zinke
Subject: Re: budget

Hey Commander ---

Just wanted to give you an update on where our campaign finances
stand. It's not good.

Unless we can raise another $16,230 between now and Wednesday the
31st, we're going to have to scale back the campaign
budget...which means we're going to lack the resources we need to
get your conservative message to the voters.

Can you personally email a few of your best supporters and ask
them to chip in $25 (or $5)?

Tell them our opponent is setting fundraising records, and that
without their support, we could be in deep trouble come election
day.

Sorry for the bad news.

- Evan

subject: "I did everything I could to stop Trump"
body:
He's not running for president | We can't say this enough, Peter -- Donald Trump isn’t just an abnormal candidate. He isn't even just a demagogue. He’s a threat to our democracy.

Everything he proposes -- everything he says -- is more than just antithetical to our values as Americans. He is fundamentally at odds with American democracy. A candidate who says he will be your voice and that he can do everything alone is not running to be your president. He’s running because he wants to rule.

So when our children, and our children’s children, study this election in their American history classes, I want to be able to say that I did everything I could to stop Trump from winning this election, and to help Hillary make history. That I loved my country so much that no matter what the polls or the pundits said, I was going to do everything in my power to save my country from a dark, dangerous fate.

That’s what I’m asking you to do here, day in, day out. Without your support, we could lose this election. It’s as simple as that.

body:
It's the reason he got involved in public service.

Dear Friend,

As over a million of Washington's children head back to school, I am so proud of Jay's commitment to education. It's been the mission of his life and the reason he got involved in public service in the first place.

I see firsthand the way Jay is working with parents, educators, administrators, and legislators to ensure every child receives a great education.

For Jay, it's personal. He knows preparing Washington's children for the 21st-century workplace requires leadership and action, not political lip service.

As young Washingtonians head back to school, and as Jay works to strengthen our education system for each and every one of them, can you show your support for his efforts? Sign on here to show you stand with him.

Strengthening and expanding the opportunities that come with a world class education is Jay's passion. His determination in making sure every child in every corner of our state has a chance to succeed comes through again and again.

Trudi Inslee

| **NEW RACE RANKING: Florida Senate is "Toss-Up/Tilt Republican"**
_\-- Rothenberg & Gonzales Political Report_ We hate to be the bearer of bad news, everyone, but you need to see this. Rothenberg has just released a new ranking of our Senate seat: we're **"Toss-Up/ Tilt Republican."** In June, before Marco Rubio broke his promise not to run again, we were a **" Pure Toss-Up,"** so this is not good. We can't let this Republican trend become a reality. [**Please contribute NOW to help >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d41/738133e4/30807d7a/7f850804/211666344/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160823b?refcode=pme160823b_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump convinced Rubio to get back into this race in a desperate attempt to save the Senate for Republicans. We knew it would make our path to victory tougher than ever. Now, their right-wing allies like the Koch brothers are outspending us by A LOT: nearly THREE TO ONE.

We just can't withstand getting drowned out by their attacks. **We have to step it up, or our chances of defeating Rubio -- and retaking the Senate -- could slip away.

Our primary is exactly one week away. Can you chip in $10 now to help us surge forward and turn the tide?** | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d41/738133e4/30807d7a/7f850805/211666344/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160823b?refcode=pme160823b_m&recurring=true&amount=3")

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Attend a launch party on Wednesday in Silver Spring
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
On Wednesday night it's time to get to work on Our Revolution. In more than 2,600 homes and spaces across the country, tens of thousands of us will gather to officially kick off the next phase of our political revolution.
There's an Our Revolution launch party happening near you. This is the closest one that we can find, but there are many more online:
**Our Revolution Launch Party in Silver Spring**
**Wednesday, August 24 at 8:15 pm EDT**
1203 Fidler Lane, Apt 1210 Security entrance - I'll be at the entrance of the building at 8:15 .
Silver Spring, MD 20910
**[RSVP to Attend](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/gpl2jf)**
[**You can find more events happening on the map.**](http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&sort=time&f%5B%5D=our-revolution&f%5B%5D=other "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&sort=time&f%5B%5D=our-revolution&f%5B%5D=other")
At this meeting, Bernie Sanders and others from Our Revolution will lay out some of the next steps we can take as a movement to empower a wave of progressive candidates this November and win the major upcoming fights for the values we share. We'll also talk about how you can be a key movement builder in your community for Our Revolution.
We really hope to see you on Wednesday night. Thanks for being part of Our Revolution.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
President
Our Revolution
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/august-24-kickoff?refcode=em160823 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/august-24-kickoff?refcode=em160823")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905, Burlington, VT 05401 | (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").
